name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Possible Linux Privilege Escalation
notes:
This Building Block detects suspicious shell commands indicating the information gathering phase as preparation for the Privilege Escalation.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Patrick Bareiss
SIGMA Title: Privilege Escalation Preparation
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious shell commands indicating the information gathering phase as preparation for the Privilege Escalation.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Possible Linux Privilege Escalation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/issue' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/*-release' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /proc/version' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'uname -a' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'uname -mrs' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'rpm -q kernel' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'dmesg | grep linux' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ls /boot | grep vmlinuz-' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/profile' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/bashrc' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat ~/.bash_profile' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat ~/.bashrc' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat ~/.bash_logout' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ps -aux | grep root' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ps -ef | grep root' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'crontab -l' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/cron*' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/cron.allow' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/cron.deny' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/crontab' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'grep -i user *' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'grep -i pass *' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ifconfig' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/network/interfaces' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/sysconfig/network' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/resolv.conf' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/networks' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'iptables -l' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ip6tables -l' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'lsof -i' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'netstat -antup' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'netstat -antpx' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'netstat -tulpn' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'arp -e' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'route' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/passwd' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/group' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/shadow' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'find / -perm -u=s' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'find / -perm -g=s' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'find / -perm -4000' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'find / -perm -2000' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'find / -perm -o+w') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Possible Linux Privilege Escalation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/issue' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/*-release' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /proc/version' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'uname -a' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'uname -mrs' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'rpm -q kernel' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'dmesg | grep linux' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ls /boot | grep vmlinuz-' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/profile' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/bashrc' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat ~/.bash_profile' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat ~/.bashrc' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat ~/.bash_logout' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ps -aux | grep root' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ps -ef | grep root' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'crontab -l' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/cron*' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/cron.allow' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/cron.deny' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/crontab' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'grep -i user *' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'grep -i pass *' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ifconfig' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/network/interfaces' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/sysconfig/network' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/resolv.conf' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/networks' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'iptables -l' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ip6tables -l' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'lsof -i' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'netstat -antup' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'netstat -antpx' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'netstat -tulpn' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'arp -e' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'route' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/passwd' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/group' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat /etc/shadow' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'find / -perm -u=s' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'find / -perm -g=s' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'find / -perm -4000' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'find / -perm -2000' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'find / -perm -o+w') AQL filter query
